titleStmt.title: SII 22.442: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 442. (A.R. No. 442 of 1906) COIMBATORE DISTRICT, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, DAṆĀYAKAṈKŌṬṬAI. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE IN THE FORT—ON THE SAME WALL

summary.p: This inscription begins with a call for the protection of the grant by Mahāpradhāni Immaḍi Rāhuttarāya Śiṅgaya-Daṇṇāyakar, and is stated in the cyclic year Vyaya which corresponds to Śaka 1268. It introduces the merchant guild Vaiśyavāṇiya-Nagarattār, also called the Danmadāvaḷar with a grandiose panegyric of their far-flung activities and other excellences, and records an agreement given by this body to contribute as paṭṭanappagudi a specified amount in cash levied annually from among their families and on articles of merchandise like women's cloths, pepper, areca-nut; yarn, salt, cereals, calves (?) and horse, towards the expenses of a festival in the month of Tai, in the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaramuḍaiyār at Turuvaḷūr alias Śitakaragaṇḍan-kōṭṭai in Oḍuvaṅga-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṉu makāppiṟatāṉi Immaṭi Irākuttarāyaṉ
ciṅkayadaṇṇāyakkar rakṣai . pūmātum jayamātum pukaḻmātum
poruntivāḻa ceṅkole nammuṭaiya ceḻuñcamaiyam vaḷarppa
tākavum tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiya tirumāluñ cempiyaṉo ṭuṭamakuṭañ
cūṭi yāḷumulakuṭaiyāḷ tuṇaiyākavuṅ kuṉṟāta cātaṉamā mukkok
kiṟkai muṭikkaṇinta maṉṟeṟiyāṭukiṉṟa malaṟpātame tuṇaiyākavu
m vāṉuntu tevarellām vantiṟaiñcun tirumaṉṟi lāṉantap peru
valliyārta maṭiyiṇaiye tuṇaiyākavum vetiyaru māriyarum viḷaṅ
kukiṉṟa veḷāḷaru motayaṉūṟparuṇatārpōl viḷaṅkumuttamarum
naṟṟavattāṟ piṟappaṟukku nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravaruñ ceṟṟavarai vā
ṉileṟṟun tiruveṇṇāḻikai yaṟaiyavaruṅ kāmaṉaippol vaṭi
vuṭaiyor kaḻalpuṉainta kaikkoḷarum tāmaṇattu mikapperiya cāliya
rum Ellārumiṉitīṇṭi Ivvulakiṟ pukaḻviḷaṅka nāṉ
mukattoṉṟāṉ paṭaitta naṟkulaṅkaṇākaita ṇaṟcirmukattu mu
ṟaiyacemaṅkalattu vaiciyavāṇiyarāy muṉṉūṟṟoṭaṟupatāki
yamuta rkkup parimāṟum paṉṉūṟu koṭiyeṉṉum pāriṭaiye paṭait
tuvaṭive rāvuttārp pārtalaivarāki yuṟaikiṉṟa celunār kaḷittār talattār
keṭka viyampukiṉṟa Ivaiyaṉaittum vāruṇāpati vācantimayart tiruppuriyo
ttut terular Aḷakāpuri ciṟappuṭaiya nantivattaṉamā poti meyntu poyaṇi
vaḷark kaṇvaḷaru māpoti tarum vallūrum nellūrum māpiramapura mayilā
ppūr vaḷaṅkotaṟko mum poṟpāruñ cirkāñciyum pūmpukār Uṟaiyūruṅ
kaṟpāru matiḷ cūḻnta karuvūrum paḻaiyāṟaiyun teṉmaturāpuri nakariyu nakaruvañcā
kaḷamutalākap paṉṉakar ntuṅkamāṟum vaiciyavāṇiyarka ntaip
perumalaiyuṅ kiḷaipuṉalcūḻ kampaiyāṟum vaṟṟātatilor vāḻavaikuṇa
varvaḷanāṭu māttaviṟṟa kaḷiyāṉ yāṉaicey vāraṇamum pūttamalar poṟciṟa
nta puravi kali mārutamuṅ koṭaiyāṉārtu viḷaṅkun toṉṟiyaṉu mali
ntārum Aṭaiyātā ruyirkollu matakkaruṭakkoṭip puḷumpā
ṟkaṭalāmeṉa muḻaṅkum paiññākameṉu mācun teṟkamalakaṇṭi
kaiyun ticai mukkiyameṉu māṉaiyum perperiya tevarkaḷā luḻimutaṟ
peṟṟuṭaiyor viṟpareṉṟuṅ kavippareṉṟum viḷaiñareṉṟum
paratareṉṟuñ coṟperiya nākareṉṟuñ cirārum perumpuvi meluya
r vaiciya vāṇikaṟku Apparice nāṉmukaṉṟaṉ tantaruḷum peruṭaiyor
vicaiyālaiyar taṉakkāka vorvaḻi tiṭaicceṇṭṭattuk kacaiyāte veṉ
ṟitiruntaṉmatāvaḷa naṟperum poḻika valla ṉākarācaṉṟaṉai veṉṟu viṟpiṭimā
maṇipaṟittu viṟṟa coḻaṉ muṭiyil vaittoraṉpuṟṟa poṉpaṟṟi yaruḷ mai
ntaṉ payaṅkarattiṉ puṟṟa taṉmakaṉai Eḻil vāḷiliṭaiyeṟṟor kāveri karai ya
yaṭaittor kamparkoyil cempoṉ meyntor muventar pāṭal koṇṭor
muṭikku māṇikkaṅ kayiṟukottor Āṇaitaṉṉai yiṭaimitittor yūki co
ṉṉa tiruttuṇāni toḷ māṉentiya kāmuṭaiya marutaṟku matiṭ koṭuttor
kārvaṇṇaṉ tirumuṉpe kaṟ viḷakkuvaittor karuppāca mikavaṟukkum
kaṇṇutaleṉa tirumuṉpe tirup
pācūr mañcāṭi poṉ peṟṟa tiṟa
lāḷar Eḻuttaṟiyun tiruvaruḷ ḷeḻi
loṟṟiyūraṟku kaḻuttarintu viḷakkuvai
tta kaliniti marapilvantor maṟapperi
yacca cantaṉ makaṉāki vantutitta ciṟappu
ṭaiya civatarait tikkeṭṭu muṟava
ḷattor peṇiyacirmaṟaiyavaṟ
ku perulakum taṟiyavaṇiyaṉpāṟ
yeṟṟi māṟār pukaḻ cumantor Iy
sarvavākyaṅkaḷumuṭaiya vaiciyavāṇiya
nakarattār taṉmamāka vyayasamvatsara
ttu taimmāsam Irupatteḻāntiyati
Oṭuvaṅkanāṭṭu toṟuvalūrāṉa cita
karakaṇṭaṉkoṭṭaiyil nāyaṉār
tāntoṉṟiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil
Utsavaberaṅkaḷāyuḷḷa mutaliyār
nāyakar mutalāka Eḻuntaruḷum nāyaṉ
mārellāraiyum Eṟiyaruḷap paṇ
ṇukaiyāl pūcaikkum taittirunā
ḷ Eḻuntaruḷukaikkum tāṅkaḷ vai
ttukkuṭutta paṭṭaṇappakuti puṭavai
kkaṭṭoṉṟukku � miḷaku poti
yoṉṟukku � pākkup poti yoṉṟu
kku � va nūl poti yoṉṟukku � Uppu poti Oṉṟukku � tavaci tāṉiyam poti Oṉṟukku � mutaraip poti Oṉṟukku � cevoṉṟukku � kutirai Oṉṟukku � mātam
Oṉṟukku piṭikaikku � Āṇṭoṉṟukku kuṭi Oṉṟukku � 4 yātoru tirunāḷukkum nāṅkaḷ tiruccāntu cāttakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cantiṟātittavarai catusāgaraparyan=tamāka taṇ
ṭikkoḷvatāka Emmilicaintu paṭṭaṉappakuti vaittuk kuṭuttom taṉma tāvaḷarom .
Digital edition of SII 22.442 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
